facts.what: Unstable approach trend detected at 500 ft AGL.
facts.why: Late configuration and incomplete brief recall.
facts.how: Go-around executed per SOP, next approach stabilized.
facts.narrative: Decision to go-around was timely and safe. Crew reset effectively and completed a nominal approach on third attempt.

analysis.content: Main gap was anticipation discipline. Positive point: correct no-fault go-around decision aligned with SOP.

recos.doctrine: Reinforce stabilized approach gates and callouts.
recos.rh: Encourage earlier assertive intervention by PM.
recos.equipements: Use approach bug setup earlier in downwind.
recos.soutien: Prepare concise approach card with trap items.
recos.entrainement: Add repeated unstable-approach scenarios in sim.

qwi.advice: Excellent safety mindset on go-around. Build earlier mental timeline for configuration and commit to gate discipline.
